programmes.show_description: While a woman is watching TV, her Husky allegedly escapes the home, enters a neighbour's house and mauls his kitten. S24, Ep2
A property owner blames her delinquency in pursuing ex-tenants for damages on her grave health issues and major surgery. S24, Ep3
A baseball coach faces time in prison or huge fines after a DUI charge; one of his player's parents bails him out. S24, Ep4
Alleged abuse of the judicial system, harassment claims, and swimming privileges for homeschooled children come into play. S22, Ep113
What starts as an inquiry about the health of a sick man, ends in a full-blown fist fight between relatives at the foot of his bed. S22, Ep114
When two woman team up to surprise their cheating boyfriend, all hell breaks loose; months later, the two women meet again and violence erupts. S22, Ep115
A man's love/hate relationship with his 16-year-old motorcycle ends with a heated lawsuit over allegedly shoddy repairs that left him stranded. S22, Ep116
Sisters accuse their mother of abuse after she sues them for allegedly destroying their bedrooms; new boyfriends allegedly break the family apart. S22, Ep117
The Judge orders a woman to sign over a vehicle to her ex-boyfriend after she sues him for a loan and childcare bills for their 8-year-old. S22, Ep118
A man says his neighbour snuck up like a quiet rat busted his eardrum and beat him to the ground; they continue their years long feud in court. S22, Ep119
A crime allegedly caught on tape is viewed in court when a man claims his ex-lover falsely accused him of vandalizing her vehicle; he insists the hooded man caught on tape is not him. S16, Ep50
Tyonne Palmer wanted the perfect family. She finds love with her boyfriend, Pastor Tracy Burleson. But when the Pastor's wife turns up dead, all eyes are on the mistress. S3, Ep3

A man says he was trying to stop a car from running him down by pounding on the hood of the oncoming vehicle. S22, Ep87
A woman sues her ex-boyfriend's mother for the return of money paid for a car; an alleged assault and child support come into play. S22, Ep88

Claiming she made over $7,000 in car payments, a young woman sues her ex-stepfather after he repossesses her vehicle. S16, Ep13

A senior citizen is accused of assaulting another senior at a Ladies' Auxiliary VFW meeting and is escorted out of her hotel room by police. She sues for damages. S16, Ep14
